title: Better 20
description: A Better version of my Modpack better16.5, that still removes deepslate and does some other cool stuff.
body:
![Better20BANNER](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f587157d-cca1-4b6d-8f68-6bffa0f473a9)
# A Better version of my Modpack better16.5, that still removes deepslate and does some other cool stuff.

## Fetures:
- Many texturepacks to pick from
- Allso a lot of shaders that are included
- Great camera controler
- Makes even the most modern GPU's cry
- Cool ambiant noises
- Satisfying UI noises
